title: Morbuy Non-Slip Bath Mat, 45 x 65 cm Green Leaf Bathroom Floor Mat Super Soft and Water Absorbent, Machine Washable Microfiber Bathroom Rug for Shower, Bedroom, Kitchen, Doorway
features: 【Ultra Abosrbent and Soft】The 100% polyester microfiber material surface, soft, thicker and when you walk out of the bathroom, will feel its soft. No balling-up! No fade! No easy drop wool!
【Non-Slip Backing】Non-slip bottom, strong Adhesion can help keep rugs in place on your floors and protect your family's safety.
【Size】We provide two size choice for you! 45 x 65cm and 50 x 80cm. it is soft, cozy and warm to make your feet feel more comfortable when stepping onto it .
【Easy to Clean】Machine washable (gentle cycle), in cold water, hang or lay flat to dry. This bathroom mat looks like new after washing and is durable for long lasting use.

【Usage】it is very suitable used in bathroom as bath rug, because its strong water absorbent, quick dry and non-slip, it also can be used for indoor hallway, office, hotel, school and home entrance as door mat inside.
description: Product Description Morbuy Non-Slip Bath Mat Create Your Bathroom Oasis We are dedicated to bringing our customers premium, high-quality, and functional household products at reasonable prices. Easy Care Our bath rug can be washed by machine, both the soft microfiber surface and the Non-skid back can be washed, in cold water, gentle cycle, and hang or lay flat to dry, do not bleach,can be used for a long time Good water absorbing capacity Exllent water absorbent and anti-skid performance, keep the floor dry and wet separation. Thicken the plush, enhance the water absorption effect. After taking shower, stepping into a soft and plush bath mat to dry your feet quickly, relieve your soles. Reinforced Stitching The bath mats is made with premium fiber locking technology so that every fiber is firmly attached onto the backing to prevent shedding during frequent machine washing. Latex Backing and TPR Backing Two types of non-slip backings Sent at random. After many tests, helps keep the mat firmly in place, that it won't slip or slide to keep you more safe and cozy. Ultra Absorbent Extra Softness & Thic Hign Dense Microfiber Non-Slip Backing Morbuy non-slip bath mat The rugs can be used widely inside house, like in front of the sink, we also provided with rich patterns and different sizes, you can find ideal decors to match with your house.
